promotion_logic.detail: _should_promote() requires coverage_floor_ok, mdape improvement threshold, and no protected cohort regression; _promotion_stop_reason() returns hold_protected_cohort_regression/hold_coverage_floor/hold_no_material_improvement as applicable.

runtime_evidence.command: python3 inline script: group promotion audits by verdict + stop_reason
runtime_evidence.interpretation: current candidate runs are blocked by no-material-improvement gate; no aggregate-only promotion observed

key_assertions.detail: protected cohort regression forces hold and stop reason hold_protected_cohort_regression.
train_loop stops with stopped_no_improvement/no_improvement_patience_exhausted when deltas fail patience policy.
resume=True raises when no resumable prior run exists.
automation status/history preserve hold/failed_gates states and normalize no active model to null.

required_for_ml_augmentation: additive ML influence through scanner recommendation contract

current_wiring.detail: scanner_recommendations rows are built only from strategy SQL source_row_json fields; no read from ML prediction/model tables.
scanner_recommendations_payload() selects directly from poe_trade.scanner_recommendations and does not join/inject ML score signals.
ML predict_one is consumed only in price_check_payload(), not in scanner ranking/opportunity projection.
ml_price_predictions_v1 is read for report confidence buckets/reasons, not scanner recommendation generation.

contract_gap.description: ML outputs currently do not feed scanner recommendation ranking or opportunity payload fields; scanner remains legacy SQL-only contract.
contract_gap.task_4a_violation_note: Task-4A defines ML augmentation as additive via the same opportunity contract; current implementation routes ML to price-check and analytics only.

additive_integration_path: Add nullable scanner_recommendations columns for semantic_key/search_hint/item_name/expected_hold_minutes/liquidity_score/freshness_minutes/gold_cost and preserve existing fields.
Add feature-gated ML ranking columns (for example ml_score/ml_reason) to scanner read model and API payload.
Populate ML fields by joining latest prediction signals keyed on stable semantic identity; fallback cleanly when ML signal is absent.
Prove before/after scanner ranking quality under gate and preserve rollback by toggling feature flag without schema rollback.
